debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
x : ℝ
hxge : x ≥ ↑n
hxlt : x < ↑n + 1
⊢ Real.log x ≤ ∑ k ∈ Icc 1 n, (↑k)⁻¹

failed_attempts:
calc
          Real.log x ≤ Real.log (n + 1) := by
            cases n
            · exact Real.log_nonpos (by linarith) (by linarith)
            · exact Real.log_le_log (by linarith) (by linarith)
          _ ≤ ∑ k ∈ Icc 1 n, (k : ℝ)⁻¹ := Real.log_nat_le_sum_inv n

simp at hxge hxlt; exact Real.log_nonpos hxge hxlt.le
        · exact (Real.log_le_log_of_le (by linarith) hxlt.le).trans (Real.log_le_sum_inv n)

subst hn; simp at *; exact Real.log_le_zero_of_le_one hxge hxlt.le
        · have : 0 < x := by linarith [Nat.one_le_cast.mpr (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn)]
          refine (Real.log_le_log_of_le this hxlt.le).trans ?_
          rw [← sum_range_sub (λ i ↦ Real.log (i + 1)), Real.log_one, sub_zero, sum_range_add_one_eq_sum_Icc]
          refine sum_le_sum (fun k hk ↦ ?_)
          rw [← Real.log_div (by linarith [mem_Icc.1 hk]) (by linarith [mem_Icc.1 hk])]
          refine (Real.log_le_sub_one (by linarith)).trans ?_
          field_simp; ring
simp [this, Real.log_of_nonpos hx]

sum_range_sub (fun i ↦ Real.log (i + 1)) n, sum_Icc_eq_sum_range]
          simp; refine sum_le_sum (fun i _ ↦ ?_)
          rw [← Real.log_div (by linarith) (by linarith), add_div, div_self (by linarith)]
          exact Real.log_add_one_le_self _

simp; exact Real.log_nonpos hxge hxlt.le
        | succ n =>
          refine (Real.log_le_log (by linarith) hxlt.le).trans ?_
          rw [← sum_range_add_one (fun i ↦ (i : ℝ)⁻¹)]
          exact Real.log_nat_le_sum_inv (n + 1)

simp [Icc_eq_empty_of_lt, Real.log_nonpos_of_le_one hxlt.le]
        · have hx_pos : 0 < x := (Nat.cast_pos.mpr hn).trans_le hxge
          refine (Real.log_le_log hx_pos (by norm_cast; linarith)).trans ?_
          rw [← Real.log_one, ← sum_range_sub (fun i => Real.log (i + 1))]
          simp only [Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one, sub_zero, Icc_eq_Ico, sum_Ico_eq_sum_range]
          refine sum_le_sum (fun i _ => ?_)
          rw [← Real.log_div (by norm_cast; linarith) (by norm_cast; linarith)]
          refine (Real.log_le_sub_one _).trans_le ?_
          rw [sub_le_iff_le_add, add_comm, ← add_div (by norm_cast; linarith)]
          simp

simp
          | succ m ih =>
            rw [sum_Icc_succ_top (Nat.one_le_succ m), Nat.cast_succ, ← Real.log_mul (by linarith) (by linarith)]
            refine (add_le_add ih (Real.log_le_sub_one_of_pos (by linarith))).trans_eq ?_
            field_simp; ring
        cases n with
        | zero => simp at hxlt; exact Real.log_nonpos hxge hxlt.le
        | succ n => exact ((Real.log_le_log_iff (by linarith) (by linarith)).mpr hxlt.le).trans (h _)
simp [sum_range_succ', range_eq_Ico, sum_Ico_add, Ico_succ_right_eq_Icc]

sub_zero]
      _ ≤ ∑ k in range n, (↑(k + 1))⁻¹ := by
        refine sum_le_sum (fun k _ => ?_)
        rw [← Real.log_div (by linarith) (by linarith)]
        apply (Real.log_le_sub_one_of_pos (by apply div_pos; linarith; linarith)).trans
        rw [add_div, div_self (by linarith)]; simp
      _ = ∑ k in Icc 1 n, (↑k)⁻¹ := by
        rw [range_eq_Ico, sum_Ico_add, ← Icc_eq_Ico]

simp at *; exact Real.log_nonpos hxge hxlt.le
        · have hx : 0 < x := by linarith [Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn]
          calc Real.log x ≤ Real.log (n + 1) := (Real.log_le_log hx (by linarith)).mpr hxlt.le
            _ ≤ ∑ i in range n, (i + 1 : ℝ)⁻¹ := Real.log_nat_cast_add_one_le_sum_range_inv n
            _ = ∑ k in Icc 1 n, (k : ℝ)⁻¹ := by rw [Finset.sum_range_add_one_eq_sum_Icc]

simp; exact Real.log_nonpos hxlt.le
        | succ n =>
          refine (Real.log_le_log_of_le (by linarith) hxlt.le).trans ?_
          rw [sum_Icc_eq_sum_range]
          simp [Real.log_nat_le_sum_range_inv]

by_cases h : n = 0
        · rw [h] at *; exact Real.log_nonpos hxge hxlt.le
        · have hx : 0 < x := by linarith [Nat.pos_iff_ne_zero.mpr h]
          exact (Real.log_le_log hx (by linarith)).trans (Real.sum_inv_Icc_ge_log n)

simp; exact Real.log_nonpos hxlt.le
        · have h1n : 1 ≤ n := Nat.pos_iff_ne_zero.mpr hn
          calc Real.log x ≤ Real.log (n + 1) := (Real.log_le_log (by linarith) (by linarith)).mpr hxlt.le
            _ = ∑ k in range n, (Real.log (k + 2) - Real.log (k + 1)) := by rw [sum_range_sub (fun i ↦ Real.log (i + 1))]; simp
            _ ≤ ∑ k in range n, (k + 1 : ℝ)⁻¹ := by
              apply sum_le_sum; intros k _
              rw [← Real.log_div (by norm_cast; linarith) (by norm_cast; linarith)]
              apply (Real.log_le_sub_one_of_pos (by apply div_pos <;> norm_cast <;> linarith)).trans
              rw [div_sub_one, (show (k + 2 : ℝ) - (k + 1) = 1 by ring), one_div]; norm_cast; linarith
            _ = ∑ k in Icc 1 n, (k : ℝ)⁻¹ := by rw [← sum_Ico_eq_sum_range, Nat.Ico_succ_eq_Icc h1n]; simp

sum_Icc_succ_sub (Nat.le_add_left 1 n)]
        refine sum_le_sum (fun k hk ↦ ?_)
        have hk' : (k : ℝ) ≠ 0 := by linarith [mem_Icc.1 hk]
        rw [← Real.log_div (by linarith [mem_Icc.1 hk]) hk', add_div, div_self hk']
        exact Real.log_le_sub_one_of_pos (by linarith [mem_Icc.1 hk])

sum_empty]; exact Real.log_nonpos (by linarith)
        · refine (Real.log_le_log (by linarith) (by linarith)).trans ?_
          rw [sum_Icc_eq_sum_range, Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.one_le_succ n)]
          exact sum_inv_nat_ge_log n.succ

sum_Ico_succ_sub]; simp
          _ ≤ ∑ k in Icc 1 n, (k : ℝ)⁻¹ := by
            apply sum_le_sum
            intro k hk
            rw [← Real.log_div (by positivity) (by positivity)]
            rw [(by field_simp [mem_Icc.1 hk]; ring : (k + 1 : ℝ) / k = 1 + (k : ℝ)⁻¹)]
            exact Real.log_add_one_le_self (by positivity)

simp; exact Real.log_nonpos hxge hxlt.le
        · have hxpos : 0 < x := by linarith
          refine (Real.log_le_log hxpos (by linarith)).mpr hxlt.le |>.trans ?_
          rw [← Real.log_one, ← sum_Icc_sub (fun k ↦ Real.log k) hn]
          refine sum_le_sum fun k hk ↦ ?_
          have h : 0 < (k : ℝ) := by linarith [mem_Icc.1 hk]
          rw [← Real.log_div (by linarith [h]) h.ne']
          exact (Real.log_le_sub_one (by linarith [h])).trans_eq (by field_simp; ring)

sum_nonneg fun k hk ↦ inv_nonneg.mpr (by norm_cast; linarith [mem_Icc.1 hk])
        · refine (Real.log_le_log hx (by norm_cast; linarith)).mpr hxlt.le |>.trans ?_
          rw [← Real.log_one, ← sum_range_sub (fun i ↦ Real.log (i + 1)), sum_range_add_one]
          refine sum_le_sum fun i _ ↦ ?_
          rw [← Real.log_div (by linarith) (by linarith)]
          exact (Real.log_le_sub_one_of_pos (by linarith)).trans (by field_simp)

sum_empty]
          exact Real.log_nonpos (by linarith)
        · have n_pos : 1 ≤ n := one_le_iff_ne_zero.mpr hn
          refine (Real.log_le_log (by linarith) (by linarith)).trans ?_
          rw [← Real.log_one, ← sum_Icc_succ_sub (fun i ↦ Real.log i) n_pos]
          refine sum_le_sum fun k hk ↦ ?_
          have k_pos : 0 < (k : ℝ) := Nat.cast_pos.mpr (by linarith [mem_Icc.1 hk])
          have k1_pos : 0 < (k : ℝ) + 1 := by linarith
          rw [← abs_of_pos k1_pos, ← abs_of_pos k_pos, ← Real.log_div k1_pos.ne' k_pos.ne']
          refine (Real.log_le_sub_one_of_pos (div_pos k1_pos k_pos)).trans ?_
          rw [add_div, div_self k_pos.ne', add_comm, add_sub_cancel_right]

subst h; simp; exact Real.log_nonpos hxge hxlt.le
        · refine (Real.log_le_log_of_le (by linarith) hxlt.le).trans ?_
          refine (Real.log_nat_add_one_le_sum_range_inv n).trans_eq ?_
          rw [sum_range_add (fun k => (k : ℝ)⁻¹) n 1, Nat.Ico_succ_atLeastAtMost]

sum_empty]
          exact Real.log_nonpos_of_le_one hxlt.le
        · have : 0 < x := by linarith [Nat.pos_iff_ne_zero.mpr hn]
          calc
            Real.log x ≤ Real.log (n + 1) := Real.log_le_log this (by linarith)
            _ = ∑ k in Ico 1 (n + 1), (Real.log (k + 1) - Real.log k) := by
              rw [sum_Ico_sub (fun k ↦ Real.log k) (Nat.one_le_succ n), Real.log_one, sub_zero]
            _ ≤ ∑ k in Ico 1 (n + 1), (↑k)⁻¹ := sum_le_sum fun k hk ↦ by
              have hk_pos : 0 < (k : ℝ) := by norm_cast; exact (mem_Ico.1 hk).1
              rw [← Real.log_div (by linarith) hk_pos.ne', add_div, div_self hk_pos.ne', add_sub_cancel']
              exact Real.log_le_sub_one_of_pos (by linarith)
            _ = ∑ k in Icc 1 n, (↑k)⁻¹ := by rw [sum_Ico_eq_sum_Icc]

subst hn; exact (Real.log_nonpos hxlt.le).trans (by simp)
        · have hx_pos : 0 < x := by linarith [Nat.cast_pos.mpr (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn)]
          exact (Real.log_le_log hx_pos (by linarith)).mpr hxlt.le |>.trans (Real.log_succ_le_sum_inv_Icc n)

simpa using Real.log_nonpos hxlt.le
        | succ n => exact (Real.log_le_log (by linarith) (by linarith)).2 hxlt.le |>.trans (Nat.sum_inv_Icc_ge_log _)

simp; exact Real.log_nonpos hxge hxlt.le
    · have h1n : 1 ≤ n := Nat.pos_iff_ne_zero.mpr h0
      have hxpos : 0 < x := (Nat.cast_pos.mpr h1n).trans_le hxge
      calc
        Real.log x ≤ Real.log (n + 1) := Real.log_le_log_of_le hxpos hxlt.le
        _ = ∑ k in Icc 1 n, (Real.log (k + 1) - Real.log k) := by
          rw [sum_Icc_sub (fun k ↦ Real.log k) h1n, Real.log_one, sub_zero]
        _ ≤ ∑ k in Icc 1 n, (k : ℝ)⁻¹ := sum_le_sum fun k hk ↦ by
          have hk0 : 0 < (k : ℝ) := Nat.cast_pos.mpr (mem_Icc.mp hk).1
          rw [← Real.log_div (by linarith) hk0.ne', add_div, div_self hk0.ne']
          exact Real.log_one_add_le_self (by linarith)

simp only [Icc_eq_empty (by linarith), sum_empty]
          exact Real.log_nonpos hxge hxlt.le
        | succ m =>
          refine (Real.log_le_log (by linarith) hxlt.le).trans ?_
          rw [← Real.log_one, ← sum_Icc_succ_sub Real.log (by linarith)]
          refine sum_le_sum fun k hk ↦ ?_
          have hk0 : 0 < (k : ℝ) := by norm_cast; linarith [mem_Icc.1 hk]
          rw [← Real.log_div (by linarith) hk0, add_div, div_self hk0.ne.symm, ← inv_eq_one_div]
          exact Real.log_le_sub_one _

simp at *; exact Real.log_nonpos hxlt.le hxge
        · have hxpos : 0 < x := by linarith
          calc Real.log x ≤ Real.log (n + 1 : ℝ) := Real.log_le_log hxpos hxlt.le
            _ = ∑ k ∈ Icc 1 n, (Real.log (k + 1) - Real.log k) := by
              rw [sum_Icc_sub (by linarith), Real.log_one, sub_zero, Nat.cast_add_one]
            _ ≤ ∑ k ∈ Icc 1 n, (k : ℝ)⁻¹ := by
              apply sum_le_sum
              intro k hk
              have hk₀ : 0 < (k : ℝ) := by linarith [Finset.mem_Icc.1 hk]
              rw [← Real.log_div (by linarith) hk₀.ne', one_div]
              exact (Real.log_le_sub_one (by linarith)).trans_eq (by field_simp [hk₀.ne']; ring)

subst hn; exact (Real.log_nonpos hxlt.le).trans (Finset.sum_nonneg fun k _ ↦ by simp)
        · have hx_pos : 0 < x := by linarith
          refine (Real.log_le_log hx_pos hxlt.le).trans ?_
          rw [← Real.log_one, ← Finset.sum_range_telescope (fun i ↦ Real.log (i + 1))]
          rw [Finset.sum_Icc_eq_sum_range (fun k ↦ (k : ℝ)⁻¹) 1 n, Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.succ_le_iff.mpr hn)]
          refine Finset.sum_le_sum fun k _ ↦ ?_
          rw [← Real.log_div (by linarith) (by linarith)]
          refine (Real.log_le_sub_one_of_pos (by linarith)).trans_eq ?_
          field_simp; ring

simp
          exact Real.log_nonpos hxge hxlt.le
        | succ n =>
          refine (Real.log_le_log (by linarith) (by linarith)).trans ?_
          exact Real.log_le_sum_inv_Icc (Nat.succ_pos n)

succ n =>
          refine (Real.log_le_log ?_ ?_).mpr hxlt.le
          · linarith
          · exact_mod_cast (n + 1).succ_pos
      _ = ∑ k in range n, (Real.log (k + 2) - Real.log (k + 1)) := by
        rw [sum_range_sub, Nat.cast_zero, Real.log_one, sub_zero]
        simp
      _ ≤ ∑ k in range n, (k + 1 : ℝ)⁻¹ := by
        refine sum_le_sum (fun k _ => ?_)
        rw [← Real.log_div (Nat.cast_add_one_pos (k + 1)).ne' (Nat.cast_add_one_pos k).ne']
        rw [show (k + 2 : ℝ) / (k + 1) = 1 + 1 / (k + 1) by field_simp [(Nat.cast_add_one_pos k).ne']]
        exact Real.log_add_one_le_self (by linarith [Nat.cast_add_one_pos k])
      _ = ∑ k in Icc 1 n, (k : ℝ)⁻¹ := by
        rw [← sum_Ico_eq_sum_range, Icc_eq_Ico]; simp

simp
        | succ n ih =>
          rw [sum_Icc_succ_top (Nat.succ_pos n), cast_succ]
          apply (le_trans _ (add_le_add ih (le_refl _)))
          rw [← le_sub_iff_add_le', ← Real.log_div (by exact_mod_cast n.succ.succ_pos.ne') (by exact_mod_cast n.succ_pos.ne')]
          convert Real.log_le_sub_one_of_pos (div_pos (by exact_mod_cast n.succ.succ_pos) (by exact_mod_cast n.succ_pos))
          · field_simp; ring
          · field_simp; ring

simp
          · rw [sum_Icc_succ_top (Nat.one_le_succ n), Nat.cast_succ, ← Real.log_mul (by linarith) (by linarith),
              mul_add, mul_one, mul_div_cancel' _ (by linarith)]
            exact (add_le_add_right (Real.log_add_one_le_self (by linarith)) _).trans (add_le_add_left ih _)
        · have : x = 0 ∧ n = 0 := by linarith
          simp [this.1, this.2]
